meta.title: Dylan González — Software Developer
meta.description: Software developer based in Panama, specialized in web and mobile applications with React, Next.js, Node.js and React Native. Passionate about building technology with social impact.

hero.name: Dylan González
hero.description: Software developer with experience in technically complex projects for demanding enterprise clients. Passionate about building technology with social impact, with a strong focus on user experience, reliable delivery and fast adaptation to new technologies.

experience.title: Work experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey in software development

highlights: Design and build robust, scalable software solutions for demanding enterprise clients, managing multiple projects simultaneously.
Contribute to requirements definition through direct client interaction, translating business needs into clear, actionable technical specifications.
Implement integrations with cloud services (file storage, API key generation, secrets management) and relational databases, with a focus on scalability and security.
Collaborate in multidisciplinary teams with agile project management in Jira (Kanban boards, epics, timelines).
Apply spec-driven, AI-assisted development methodologies (SDD) to speed up the delivery of robust, maintainable solutions.
Built a monolithic web dashboard with integrated frontend, backend and MySQL database, enabling centralized management of users, roles and locations for UTP (Coclé Regional Center).
Developed a mobile app (Android/iOS) connected to the system, with real-time location tracking, safe-zone configuration and caregiver alerts.
Designed the platform with a focus on accessibility and usability for people with disabilities.
Developed an Android app for medication management for older adults and people with cognitive disabilities, using NFC technology.
Implemented automated SMS alerts to keep caregivers informed.
Delivered a working solution on time and within the agreed requirements.

projects.title: Featured personal projects
projects.subtitle: Some of my most relevant work

items.name: Surbantown E-commerce
items.description: Online store built with Shopify that automates sales management, inventory control and product updates, improving the shopping experience.

items.name: ContigoApp
items.description: Web and mobile ecosystem for real-time monitoring of older adults with disabilities: geolocation, safe zones, push alerts and an admin panel for UTP.

items.name: NFC medication management
items.description: Android app using NFC technology to manage medications for older adults, with automatic reminders and alerts for family members and caregivers.

items.name: Batisuerte
items.description: Mobile app for lottery ticket management: number registration, automatic payment calculation, thermal ticket printing and Excel export.

items.name: Exoplanets-AI
items.description: Interactive 3D visualization of exoplanets at real scale with scientific data from the NASA API, built during the Midudev and Vercel hackathon.

items.name: TesloShop E-commerce
items.description: Full e-commerce with user authentication, shopping cart and online payments via PayPal, built as an advanced Next.js project.

items.name: AccesaYa
items.description: Web app that locates accessible restrooms and parking spots in Panama using GPS, improving mobility for people with motor disabilities. Presented at JIC UTP.
